title: Adult Literacy Programme
summary: Build foundational reading and writing skills in English and Afrikaans.
description: Weekly classes covering basic literacy, numeracy, and life skills. Open to adults 18+. Certification available upon completion.

title: Entrepreneurship Lab
summary: Practical business skills for starting and growing a small enterprise.
description: A 12-week programme covering business planning, financial literacy, marketing, and networking. Includes mentorship from local entrepreneurs.

title: Work 4aLiving Pathways
summary: Job readiness and placement support for young adults.
description: CV writing, interview preparation, workplace etiquette, and direct referrals to local employers. Partnered with J-Bay business network.
